examples.title: Algorithm: Stack Implementation using Arrays
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StackOperations
INPUT: array of size MAX, top index
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 PROCEDURE Push(value)
 IF top == MAX - 1 THEN
 THROW OverflowError
 END IF
 top = top + 1
 array[top] = value
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE Pop()
 IF top == -1 THEN
 THROW UnderflowError
 END IF
 value = array[top]
 top = top - 1
 RETURN value
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE Peek()
 IF top == -1 THEN
 THROW UnderflowError
 END IF
 RETURN array[top]
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE IsEmpty()
 RETURN top == -1
 END PROCEDURE
END
examples.explanation: Pseudocode showing the basic operations of a stack implemented using an array.
